word: G4903 - συνεργέω - synergéō - soon-erg-eh'-o - Help with

sections.paragraph:
- Original: συνεργέω

- Transliteration: sunergeo

- Phonetic: soon-erg-eh'-o

- Definition:

1. to work together, help in work, be partner in labour

2. to put forth power together with and thereby to assist

- Origin: from G4904

- TDNT entry: 21:31,1

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4904; to be a fellow worker that is co-operate: - help (work) with work (-er) together.
